message:
mcp-ruqu Phase B: route ruqu_simulate through ruqu-core (real ~26k LOC lib)

User: "no stubs". The v0.0.x state_vector::simulate (~870 LOC clean-room
reference impl in ruqu-backend) is replaced with delegation to
vendor/ruvector/crates/ruqu-core's Simulator::run — the production
SIMD-accelerated quantum simulator with noise models and multi-threading.

  crates/mcp-ruqu/Cargo.toml
    + ruqu-core path-dep on vendor/ruvector/crates/ruqu-core
      (workspace members at vendor/ruvector/Cargo.toml satisfies
      ruqu-core's `edition.workspace = true`)

  crates/mcp-ruqu/src/ruqu_core_engine.rs (NEW, 120 lines)
    + compile(circuit) — translate our v0.0 wire Circuit/Gate to
      ruqu-core QuantumCircuit/Gate (8 gate kinds: H/X/Y/Z/S/T/Rz/Cx)
    + simulate(circuit) — Simulator::run + map ruqu-core Complex
      back into our wire `C` shape (layout-compatible, both are
      `{re: f64, im: f64}`)
    + 3 unit tests (ground state, H superposition, Bell pair) that
      exercise the upstream lib end-to-end and assert correct
      amplitudes

  crates/mcp-ruqu/src/server.rs:465
    state_vector::simulate(&circuit)   ← was the v0.0.x stub
       →
    ruqu_core_engine::simulate(&circuit)   ← real upstream lib

  crates/mcp-ruqu/src/lib.rs
    + pub mod ruqu_core_engine;

Wire shape unchanged — same SimulateResponse with witness, dim,
amplitudes_head, truncated. Witness chain unchanged because it's
anchored on the input Circuit shape, not the engine that produced
the state vector. Two operators on two machines running the same
circuit now get the same witness via the SAME real upstream simulator,
not via two clean-room re-implementations agreeing.

The other simulate path (state_vector::simulate at server.rs:872)
is in a stabilizer-replay codepath; left for the next Phase B step
to avoid scope creep in this commit.

Tests: 3/3 ruqu_core_engine inline tests pass.
Local binary reinstalled to ~/.cargo/bin/ruqu-mcp; the local-stdio
plugin profile picks up the real engine on next /reload-plugins.

Phase B remaining:
  - Stabilizer / TensorNetwork / Hardware backends similarly
  - rvdna-backend → vendor/ruvector/examples/dna real impl
    (4-deep transitive ruvector-{core,attention,gnn,graph} chain)

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -47,10 +47,17 @@ name = "ruqu-mcp"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-# The substrate this server wraps. Path-dep onto the sibling
-# `ruqu-backend/` crate per ADR-001; no workspace.
+# The v0.0.x stub substrate (StateVector / Stabilizer / TensorNetwork /
+# Hardware-stub) — kept for the existing wire shape + witness semantics.
 ruvector-rulake-ruqu = { path = "../ruqu-backend" }
 
+# Phase B: the real upstream quantum simulator (~26k LOC).
+# vendor/ruvector/crates/ruqu-core ships `Simulator::run_shots(&circuit,
+# shots, seed)` with SIMD acceleration, noise models, multi-threading.
+# Wired alongside the stub so the planner can route the actual compute
+# through the real lib without changing the MCP wire shape.
+ruqu-core = { path = "../../vendor/ruvector/crates/ruqu-core" }
+
 # ruLake itself — needed for `RuLake::search_one` (the cache short-
 # circuit `ruqu_replay` rides on) and for `RuLakeBundle` / witness
 # byte-equality semantics. Match the version mcp-server pins.
